events.summary: Discuss the BPM recommendation deck prior to...

prep.summary: Your recent syncs with Steve focus on shifting developmental tools—like the business analysis helper—into official TPM apps while navigating governance with Chuck and the Gen AI Council. The Spider Tool draft requires immediate reconciliation with a CIO lead—relying on historical testing context—to finalize the tech decision. You must also address capacity constraints with Deepak and manage the integration friction surrounding the 2027 Socotra product timeline.
tasks: Align with a CIO lead to reconcile the Spider Tool draft with historical testing context.
Address the dotted-line governance hurdles with Chuck and the Gen AI Council—focusing on long-term tool transitions.
Schedule an alignment meeting with Deepak's team to resolve the manual reporting risks on the Socotra integration.
Prepare shared resource materials for the upcoming EA Library Initiative discussion with Ostrakamp.
prep.title: Sync with Mark | Steve

prep.summary: Your review of the work notes reveals a critical discussion on May 21st regarding the 2A Text rollout planned for 2026. The Optimization team requires an isolated, scalable sandbox environment to test these two-way texting capabilities—alongside other major releases—to prepare frontline adjusters. Technical leadership warns of massive hurdles—specifically around funding, enterprise ownership, and the complexity of achieving downstream integration parity.
tasks: Resolve the funding and enterprise ownership disputes—specifically for the 2026 2A Text sandbox environment—before technical planning proceeds.
Address the technical constraints of the current GuideWire Cloud pre-production environment—notably the highly restricted, unintegrated setup and unmasked data issues.
Align with the Optimization team to scale down their massive 9,000-user baseline requirement—or validate if this scale is absolutely necessary for initial two-way SMS testing.
Establish clear environment parity guidelines—detailing how downstream enterprise applications will integrate—to avoid critical defects during frontline adjuster onboarding.
prep.title: TWT Security and MFA Requirements

events.summary: EMG Engage - Intro to Architecture w/Mark Francis
EMG Engage - Intro to Architecture w/Mark Francis
Monthly 1:1 Architecture Sync w/ Suhas | Mark Francis

prep.summary: You must align with Suhas on major upcoming architectural inflections—specifically the transition of telematics data to AWS, Iceberg, and Domino Nexus—while addressing the operational friction caused by unplanned pilot projects. The upcoming ServiceNow evaluation remains highly contentious—with critical decisions looming over vendor lock-in versus internal monitoring solutions—alongside the pressing need for structured sandbox environments for the 2026 P&C rollouts. You also need to finalize AI prompt governance and establish a consumption-based chargeback model to curb high-end model usage before these initiatives scale further.
tasks: Schedule an alignment meeting with Deepak to address the stalled Resiliency/NART process mapping.
Revise the ServiceNow POC presentation deck for Dan Griffiths by hiding slides 6, 7, 15, and 515.
Establish a formalized business engagement process to involve architecture earlier in pilot projects.
Implement a consumption-based chargeback framework to govern high-end AI and LLM model usage.
prep.title: Monthly 1:1 Architecture Sync w/ Suhas | Mark Francis
